login.title: Sign in to your shop
login.store_visitor_hint: Shop customer? Visit the storefront subdomain directly, e.g.
login.lookup_modal_desc: Enter the email you signed up with — we'll tell you which subdomain owns this shop.
login.lookup_not_found: No shop found for this email. Double-check the address, or open a new shop at /create.
login.lookup_rate_limited: Too many requests — please try again in a moment.
login.subdomain_body_1: This domain is the storefront — it's for customers.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Today's revenue, active users, and upstream balance at a glance
dashboard.low_balance_warn: ⚠️ Wholesale balance is below {threshold} (currently {current}). Top up soon to avoid blocking paid customers.

onboarding.step1_desc: Pick where your relay forwards API calls

step1.intro: Pick how customers' /v1/messages actually reaches an upstream.
step1.intro_byok_tail: lets you fully control the upstream.
step1.rec_bullet_3: Top up the platform wholesale balance = inventory
step1.rec_bullet_4: Each sale deducts face value from your balance — no provider deals
step1.byok_title: I have my own API key (BYOK)
step1.byok_subtitle: Anthropic / OpenAI / your own relay — you take the wheel.
step1.byok_bullet_1: Negotiate your own providers, set your own costs
step1.byok_bullet_2: Top up the upstream API key yourself (your money)
step1.byok_bullet_3: You own outages, price hikes, bans
step1.byok_bullet_4: Multi-key rotation / protocol shims — baked in

step3.intro: We pre-seeded 4 standard plans. Toggle them here, or jump to
step3.no_plans: No plans found (DB may not be seeded).

step4.note: Payments wiring is handled by the payments agent. If you haven't received those two routes yet, skip this step — it won't block the main flow.
step4.save_warn: Backend payment endpoint isn't live yet (payments agent is shipping it). You can skip this step for now:

step5.title: Your shop is live
step5.subtitle: Share this link — customers can sign up and order right away.
step5.next_step_finance_prefix: Top up your wholesale balance in
step5.next_step_users_tail: and share them in your target communities

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Subscription and token-pack offerings for your customers (dual-track billing)
plans.empty_subscription: No subscription plans yet — click "+ New plan" to create one, or finish the
plans.empty_token_pack: No token packs yet — click "+ New plan" to create one (one-time balance, no expiry), or finish the
plans.billing_sub_desc: Renews each cycle; expires if not renewed
plans.remove_confirm: Unlist plan "{name}"? Existing orders are not affected.

channels.title: Upstream channels
channels.subtitle: Multi-protocol routing · multi-key rotation · one-click connection test
channels.empty_hint_tail: — or pick the "Recommended" hero card to enable llmapi.pro wholesale.
channels.select_hint: Select a channel on the left to view / edit details
channels.hint_name: Free-form label so you can identify the channel later (no functional impact).
channels.hint_provider_type: Determines which protocol we use to call upstream. Switching providers auto-fills the default base URL.
channels.hint_base_url: Upstream API root (usually includes /v1). Switching providers auto-fills the official default.
channels.ph_api_key: sk-... or whatever the upstream issued you
channels.hint_api_key: Credential the upstream issued. We only use it to forward requests; it never leaks to customers.
channels.test_err_auth: Auth failed — API key is invalid or lacks permission. Check the key is copied in full and still active upstream.
channels.test_err_rate_limit: Rate-limited by upstream (but this confirms the key is valid). Try again later.
channels.test_err_unreachable: Cannot reach base_url — verify the URL spelling, network reachability, and upstream service status.
channels.test_err_protocol: Upstream response does not match the expected protocol — base_url path may be wrong (missing /v1?).
channels.test_err_not_implemented: This provider is not implemented yet (v0.4 roadmap). Use anthropic / openai / llmapi-wholesale instead.

system_setting.title: System settings
system_setting.subtitle: Signup switch / maintenance mode / banner announcement (per tenant)
system_setting.signup_desc: When off, new end users can't sign up on your storefront. Existing users are unaffected.
system_setting.maint_desc: When on, both the storefront and /v1/messages return 503 — only the admin console stays reachable. Use sparingly.
system_setting.maint_confirm: ⚠ Enabling maintenance mode will block all end-user requests with 503. Continue?
system_setting.announce_desc: Show one banner on the storefront homepage (visible to end users). Leave empty to disable.
system_setting.announce_placeholder: e.g. "Maintenance window Tue 02:00–04:00 UTC" — leave empty to hide

payment_config.title: Payment settings
payment_config.subtitle: Manage Alipay / USDT and other end-user payment options (tenant-isolated; secrets masked server-side)
payment_config.alipay_card_desc_post: , configure the RSA2 key pair, then paste the values here. The private key is masked once saved — pasting a new value will overwrite it.
payment_config.private_key_unsaved: Unsaved. Click Save to submit, or Revert to discard.
payment_config.usdt_card_desc: Paste your TRC20 / ERC20 address. Once set, orders show a QR + wait for on-chain confirmation.

create_panel.title: Open a free shop
create_panel.auto_subdomain_desc: You can rename it later in admin, or bind your own domain via CNAME.
create_panel.tos_prefix: By clicking "Create shop" you agree to our
create_panel.done_subtitle: Signed in automatically. Redirecting to the admin console…
create_panel.done_note_1_post: (this root domain — right where you are)
create_panel.done_note_3: · Want your own domain? Bind a CNAME in settings (shipping in v0.2)
create_panel.disabled_body_pre: This panel is running in private mode. Operators can set

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Shop name, logo, theme color, banner, footer
branding.preview_hero_subtitle: Pay per token or pick a monthly plan
branding.preview_hint: Rough preview — the real storefront renders the full layout.
branding.logo_hint: Square PNG, ≥ 128×128 recommended. Direct upload isn't supported yet — host on your CDN and paste the URL.
branding.ph_announcement: e.g. 10% off this week with code SUMMER

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Login email / password / API access / danger zone
settings.password_saved_ok: Updated — use the new password next time you sign in
settings.twofa_body: 2FA ships in v0.2. For now, use a strong password and secure your email.
settings.api_webhook_hint: Webhooks push order / user events to your service (shipping in v0.2).
settings.danger_body: Deleting the shop wipes all users, orders, and subscriptions. This is irreversible.
settings.delete_confirm_prefix: This will delete the entire shop and cannot be undone. Type the shop slug "
settings.delete_pending: Self-serve delete ships in v0.2 once the audit flow is wired. For now, contact the platform if you need to delete.

stats.title: Analytics
stats.subtitle: Deep analytics (shipping in v0.2 W3)
stats.card_desc: Planned: retention cohorts · plan funnel · upstream cost margin · churn signals
stats.card_body: The first reports ship in the v0.2 W3 sprint. For now, the live core metrics live on the Dashboard.

users.title: End users
users.subtitle: Users registered on your storefront (click a header to sort; search + selection enables bulk actions)

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: End-user orders, payments, and refunds (search · sort · bulk export)
orders.search_placeholder: Search by email or order ID…
orders.ph_reason: e.g. user request / outage / wrong order …
orders.warn_irreversible: Refunding also rolls back the subscription. This is irreversible — make sure you've coordinated with the user off-site.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Upstream top-ups + revenue reports + withdrawals
finance.low_balance_warn: ⚠️ Balance is running low — paid orders won't get upstream tokens. Top up soon.
finance.withdraw_pending: Withdrawals ship in v0.2 — for now, reach out to the platform team directly.
finance.topup_note: Note: this is currently book-only — reconcile with the platform off-site first. Backend deducts atomically.

detail.delete_default_blocked: Can't delete the default channel — make another one default first
detail.advanced_hint: (defaults cover ~99% of use cases — leave alone unless you know why)
detail.models_hint: Comma-separated; empty = no restriction. e.g. claude-sonnet-4-7,claude-opus-4-7
detail.model_mapping_hint: Rewrite the model name customers request to the real upstream model
detail.custom_headers_hint: Rarely needed: extra HTTP headers added to every request we send upstream. E.g. enable Anthropic prompt-caching beta: anthropic-beta → prompt-caching-2024-07-31. Leave empty if unsure.
detail.key_empty_prefix: No keys on this channel yet (legacy api_key=
detail.key_too_short: Key must be at least 8 chars

hero.title: Recommended — llmapi.pro wholesale upstream
hero.body_mid: by default — no need to negotiate Anthropic / OpenAI keys yourself. We've baked Claude / GPT wholesale pricing into the upstream —
hero.body_strong: every sale deducts face value from your balance
hero.body_post: , and the rest is between you and your customer.
hero.low_balance_pre: Wholesale balance below ¥50 — paid plans deduct from this balance. Top up at
hero.no_upstream_desc: Buy a llmapi.pro plan and your upstream channel is auto-provisioned — Claude / GPT wholesale pricing, zero ops. After purchase click the 3api handoff in your llmapi dashboard to come back here.

key_row.copy_title: Copy the full key to clipboard
key_row.copy_fallback_label: Copy the key below (auto-copy was blocked by the browser):

tour.step_plans_desc: Create and edit the plans you sell to customers (Pro, Max5x, etc.). We seed 4 by default — change pricing or add more whenever.
tour.step_channels_desc: Manage your upstream LLM providers. The default points at llmapi.pro / wholesale (works out of the box); you can also BYOK your own Anthropic key.
tour.step_wholesale_desc: Your top-up balance with 3api. Each sale deducts face value from this. We email when it dips below ¥50.
tour.step_branding_desc: Your shop logo, colors, banner, custom domain. This is what your customers see.
tour.step_cmdk_desc: Press Ctrl / Cmd + K anytime to open the command palette — jump to any page or trigger common actions fast.
tour.step_theme_desc: Light / dark / system. Saved in your browser.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Subscribe events (order.paid / subscription.expired / refund.processed / wholesale.low) to a URL of your choice. Every request carries an HMAC SHA256 signature (X-3api-Signature).
webhooks.empty_rows: No webhooks yet — click the button above to add one.
webhooks.delete_confirm_suffix: . All delivery history will be deleted as well (CASCADE).
webhooks.new_subtitle: The HMAC secret is returned once on creation — save it now (you can never read it back).
webhooks.verify_hint_html: Verify on your side: header X-3api-Signature: sha256=<hex> equals HMAC-SHA256(secret, request body).
webhooks.form_url_help: When an event fires we POST a JSON body to this URL with X-3api-Signature (HMAC-SHA256) and X-3api-Event headers.

logs.title: Call Logs
logs.subtitle: Per-request token use / latency / status — filter by status, model, user, time

redemption.title: Redemption Codes
redemption.subtitle: Batch-generate codes for Telegram / QQ group marketing. Customers redeem in their dashboard for instant quota.
redemption.field_prefix_hint: Up to 16 chars, makes batches recognizable in groups (e.g. 2026Q2-)
redemption.generated_hint: {count} codes generated. This is the only time the full list is shown — click "Copy all" and save.

getting_started.title: Start serving customers
getting_started.subtitle: {done} of {total} steps done — finish to start accepting customers
getting_started.done_subtitle: All ready. Keep refining your brand, list more plans, or invite affiliates.
getting_started.path_a_title: A · I have my own domain
getting_started.path_a_desc: Bind a CNAME — customers access your domain and self-serve. 3api stays invisible.
getting_started.path_b_desc: Issue sk-* keys or redemption codes from the admin and hand them to customers off-band.
getting_started.tip_share: Share https://{domain} with your customers. Add a payment QR + support contact on the brand page.
getting_started.tip_redemption: {count} unused redemption codes ready — share them with customers to claim balance on your storefront.

setup.title: Get Started — ABC walkthrough
setup.subtitle: Run through these in order to take your service live. Each step links to the page where you'll do the work.
setup.progress_subtitle: {done}/{total} · finish all 6 to start serving customers
setup.s1_desc: Decide where requests get forwarded. Use the platform's wholesale upstream (llmapi.pro, ready out of the box) or BYOK with your own Anthropic / OpenAI key.
setup.s1_b1: Recommended: pick llmapi.pro wholesale, top up the wallet, no need to source keys yourself
setup.s1_b2: BYOK: paste your own Anthropic / OpenAI key — requests forward through your account, not the platform's
setup.s1_b3: Multiple upstreams supported with weight / failover routing
setup.s2_desc: Decide the product shape: monthly subscription, traffic pack, or token-metered billing.
setup.s2_b1: Four reference plans pre-seeded at 2× markup — enable, delete, or re-price as you wish
setup.s2_b2: Subscription (recurring) + token packs (one-shot) — pick what your customers prefer
setup.s2_b3: Plan price = retail price you charge. Wholesale cost is lower, the spread is your margin.
setup.s3_desc: Store name, logo, accent color, announcement — these show up wherever customers see your store.
setup.s3_b2: Accent color drives buttons and emphasis text — pick one that matches your logo
setup.s3_b3: Announcement bar is a good spot for promos or new-feature notices
setup.s4_desc: How do customers buy from you? Two paths — both work end-to-end. A is the most polished, B is the fastest to start.
setup.s4_a_intro: Customers visit your domain (e.g. api.your-site.com), sign up, pick a plan, pay, and get a key — without ever knowing 3api exists. Most polished, mostly hands-off.
setup.s4_a_step1: Pick a subdomain at your registrar (Cloudflare / Aliyun / DNSPod / GoDaddy)
setup.s4_a_step2: Add a CNAME record pointing to:
setup.s4_a_step3: Come back to the brand page, paste the domain, hit 'Verify DNS'
setup.s4_a_step4: Once verified, customers visiting https://{domain} land on your store. SSL is auto-issued.
setup.s4_a_cta: Go to brand page → bind CNAME
setup.s4_b_intro: No domain needed. Two manual options: issue sk-* keys directly (best for fixed customers, friends, small teams) or generate redemption codes (best for batch resale).
setup.s4_b_keys_desc: Generate one sk-* key per customer in the admin, hand them the key. They don't need to sign up or log in.
setup.s4_b_redeem_desc: Bulk-generate N codes with a fixed face value. Hand them out — customers redeem on your storefront for account balance.
setup.s4_b_storefront_note: Your default storefront URL (only you and your customers see it, not search engines):
setup.s5_desc_a: Customers paying you via your store need at least one configured channel. Alipay for China, Stripe / PayPal for international.
setup.s5_desc_b: If you're on the 'issue key directly' path you've already collected the money out-of-band (WeChat, Alipay, cash). No payment config needed in admin — skip this step.
setup.s5_b1: Alipay (recommended for CN): merchant APPID + private key go in here
setup.s5_b2: Stripe (intl. card): sk_live_* + add webhook URL pointing to /payments/stripe/webhook
setup.s5_b3: USDT (TRC20/ERC20): paste your wallet address — on-chain confirms automatically
setup.s6_desc_a: Open your storefront, sign up a test account, place a small real order, confirm everything works end-to-end. Don't skip — self-test before going live.
setup.s6_desc_b: Issue your first test key, then call /v1/messages with curl or the Anthropic SDK to confirm a real response.
setup.s6_a_b1: New email → sign up → pick the cheapest plan → pay it
setup.s6_a_b2: Take the key, run a real curl against /v1/messages, expect HTTP 200
setup.s6_b_b1: On 'Issue Keys', enter a test customer label (e.g. test@test.local)
setup.s6_b_b2: Copy the key + share template, run the curl from the template against your storefront

keys.title: Issue API keys directly
keys.subtitle: Sign sk-* keys for customers from the admin. Customers don't need to sign up or log in — just hand them the key.
keys.form_subtitle: Customer label + quota → one-click → copy & deliver
keys.field_label_hint: Email, nickname, or note — for your eyes only, used to find this customer later
keys.empty_hint: Fill the form on the left → generate → hand the key to your customer
keys.confirm_revoke: Revoke {prefix}…? It will stop working immediately. This cannot be undone.
keys.no_domain_hint_pre: No custom domain bound yet. Customers' baseUrl will be:
keys.no_domain_hint_post: — after binding a custom domain, replace this URL with yours.
keys.issued_warn: Copy & save now. This is the only time the full key is shown — only the prefix is recoverable later.
keys.share_template:
Hi! Here is your API key:

{key}

Base URL: {url}

Example (curl):

curl {url}/messages \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {key}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" \
  -d '{{
    "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5",
    "max_tokens": 1024,
    "messages": [{{"role": "user", "content": "hi"}}]
  }}'

Claude Code / Anthropic SDK / any compatible client: set ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL to the URL above, ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN to the key.
keys.err_user_exists_unfound: Customer already exists but couldn't be read back — refresh and retry

header.signup_paused_title: Signups are paused for this shop
header.maintenance_body: We're doing some maintenance — parts of the site may be unavailable.

pricing.title: Pick your plan
pricing.subtitle: Monthly subscription or a one-time token pack — pick what fits you.
pricing.empty: The shop owner hasn't set up plans yet. Check back soon.
pricing.section_sub_desc: Renew each cycle · steady daily use
pricing.section_pack_desc: One purchase · flexible · used until empty
pricing.faq_api_q: How do I use the API?
pricing.faq_api_a_1: Any client that speaks the Anthropic Messages API — Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue, the official SDK — works out of the box.
pricing.faq_api_a_4: key we issued in the Authorization header. See the
pricing.faq_topup_a: Alipay QR, USDT-TRC20, and USDT-ERC20 are all supported. Renew manually before expiry to avoid service interruption.
pricing.faq_refund_a: Unused / within 7 days → full refund. Already-consumed tokens are deducted pro rata. See the terms or contact the shop owner.
pricing.faq_quota_a: Billed per token (input + output). API keys share the account-level subscription balance; you can cap per key to prevent misuse.
pricing.faq_contact_a: Email the shop owner directly, or check Dashboard → Account for contact details.

plan_card.no_month_limit: No monthly cap — use at your own pace

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.no_sub_hint: Buy a plan to unlock daily check-in. A 7-day streak gets a bonus.
checkin.checked_already: Already checked in today. Tomorrow you get
checkin.msg_already: Already checked in today — come back tomorrow

marketing_pricing.hero_title: A Claude-compatible API gateway for teams
marketing_pricing.hero_body_pre: No upstream key sourcing required — 3api ships with
marketing_pricing.hero_body_post: built in. Sign up and start serving traffic the same day.
marketing_pricing.compare_subtitle_pre: The main differences at a glance (full matrix in
marketing_pricing.compare_row2_newapi: Days to weeks (key sourcing + pool tuning)
marketing_pricing.compare_footnote: BYOK supported: run llmapi wholesale alongside your own keys, with priority routing and auto failover.
marketing_pricing.plans_subtitle: The four base tiers below ship at the platform wholesale rate. Operators adjust names, prices, token quotas, and model allow-lists from the admin console.
marketing_pricing.profit_explain: Retail pricing is set by the operator in the admin console — adjust it to match your audience and cost structure.
marketing_pricing.footer: Powered by 3API Panel · Open source under MIT

landing.subtitle: Claude / GPT compatible API with monthly plans. Claude Code, Cursor, Cline — all work out of the box.

marketing_landing.hero_subtitle: Token-based billing with optional monthly plans. Claude Code, Cursor, Cline — all work out of the box.
marketing_landing.footer: Powered by 3API Panel · Open source under MIT

marketing_dashboard.new_key_label: New key (shown once — copy and save it)

billing.title: Dashboard
billing.token_pack_pending: Standalone token packs are launching soon. For now, renew or upgrade your subscription to add quota.

dashboard_settings.title: Dashboard
dashboard_settings.validate_min_pwd: Password must be at least 6 chars
dashboard_settings.endpoint_pwd_404: This backend doesn't expose a password-change endpoint. Please contact support.

keys.title: Dashboard
keys.issued_title: New key issued (shown once — copy and save it)
keys.empty_hint: No API keys yet — click the button above to issue your first one.
keys.name_hint: Name is for your reference only — model access inherits from the current subscription.
keys.revoke_body: Revoking takes effect immediately; in-flight requests are unaffected. This cannot be undone.
keys.howto_p1: Point your client's baseUrl at this site, and use the key above as the Authorization header:

docs.title: API documentation
docs.intro: This site's API is fully compatible with the Anthropic Messages API — any Anthropic-compatible client works.
docs.auth_body_mid: on the keys page, then pass
docs.auth_alert_post: header is also supported — fully compatible with Anthropic's official spec.
docs.client_cc_body: Set ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL to {origin} and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to your sk-*.
docs.client_continue_body: Provider = anthropic, apiBase = same as above, apiKey = same as above.
docs.errors_body: Errors match Anthropic exactly — HTTP 4xx/5xx + a JSON body. Official SDKs parse them directly.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.missing_order_pre: Missing order parameter. Open it from
checkout.provider_offline_pre: This channel isn't live yet. Your order is reserved — you can pay off-site via support, or come back later via

checkout.usdt_alert: Send USDT to the address below — we'll confirm on-chain automatically.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.success: If that email is registered, we've sent a reset link — check your inbox.

reset_password.success: Password reset — redirecting to sign in…
reset_password.validate_min_pwd: Password must be at least 6 chars

redeem.title: Redeem code
redeem.card_subtitle: Redeemed value is credited to your current account quota.
redeem.faq_q1: Each code is single-use and only valid for the store that issued it.
redeem.faq_q2: Quota lands instantly — check the Usage tab to confirm.
redeem.faq_q3: Got "Code not found"? Make sure you’re logged into the correct store.

models.title: Supported Models + Rates
models.subtitle: All models are billed per token. Default price is the station owner’s retail floor; owners can override per plan in the admin panel.
models.mode_wholesale_desc: Uses the llmapi.pro wholesale upstream — works out of the box, no key pool negotiation.
models.mode_byok_desc: Station owners configure their own Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini keys under Upstream Channels.
models.footnote_pricing: Prices shown are the station owner’s default floor (input ¥1/M, output ¥5/M). Owners can override per plan in the admin panel.
